title: How to use an API to change the column type?
excerpt:
Is there an API available for updating the column type, as I cannot find relevant information in the API documentation? 
Thanks

posts.author: jake.luo (jake)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there an API available for updating the column type, as I cannot find relevant information in the API documentation?

Thanks

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Welcome to the community Jake!

Changing a column type is not possible at the moment, but we’ll take this as a feature request.

Can you share your application’s use case & why you need to change the column type via API?
